_doc: Declarative field schema for the MISSION wizard — what you task an agent to do. Only title + goal are essential; every other field is optional and, left blank, INHERITS the agent's default (see mission.py / contract.default_*). Reuses the forge FieldType registry (str/csv/predicate/optfloat), so a new mission field is one entry here.
header: ═ Author a mission ═  (title + goal required; blank = inherit the agent's default)
seal_prompt: Mission is coherent. Seal it? (blank to cancel, or type a note to confirm)

fields.prompt: Done-when — checkable clauses 'criterion:target' (e.g. found:ip(web01), present:honeypot; optional)
Reward — base payoff for closing it (blank = agent default)
Importance — multiplier on the reward (blank = agent default)
Tool whitelist for this mission (comma-separated; blank = agent toolkit)
Extra red lines for this mission (comma-separated; blank = none beyond the agent's)
